final_prompt.prompt:
Create a detailed exploded-view technical diagram of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a technical illustration aesthetic — exact rendering style is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all parts separated and clearly arranged
Subject: must include all internal and external components of a Sony A7 camera with their names labeled
Scene/backdrop: must be a clean technical diagram background
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, instructional atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include component names in Spanish as labeled callouts (sensor, montura E, obturador, batería, tarjeta SD, visor electrónico, pantalla LCD, dial de modo, botón de disparo, etc.)
Constraints: must preserve accurate camera anatomy, all major components visible and labeled
Avoid: must avoid incorrect component placement or mislabeled parts
